subject: Revert calculate button to blue and fix mobile gradient background
body:
Reverted calculate button from gray back to blue (bg-blue-600) based on user preference for the original blue styling. The blue provides better visual prominence for the primary action button.

Fixed mobile sticky gradient background to use gray-800 (#1F2937) instead of gray-900 (#111827). This matches the card background colors and eliminates the visual discontinuity where the sticky container area appeared noticeably darker than the surrounding cards.

Changes:
- index.html: Restored bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700, removed shadow-lg and border
- styles.css: Updated gradient from #111827 to #1F2937 in mobile sticky container
- UI_UX_GUIDE.md: Updated all documentation to reflect blue button and corrected gradient

The combination of blue button + gray-800 gradient provides both visual prominence for the action and seamless integration with the card-based layout.
title: Revert calculate button to blue and fix mobile gradient background
